title: Marketing Executive
description:
Job Title: Marketing Executive


💛 About YU HOME

At YU HOME, we’re redefining smart living — one innovative home solution at a time.

From our award-winning Automated Laundry Systems to our expanding range of smart home appliances, we help families live smarter, cleaner, and more comfortably.

As we grow across Singapore and Malaysia, we’re looking for creative minds who want to grow with us — people who love turning ideas into impact and believe every campaign can make a difference.


🎯 About the Role

The Marketing Executive will be part of a dynamic, hands-on marketing team driving YU HOME’s brand story across digital, retail, and event platforms.

This role is ideal for someone with creative flair, curiosity about technology, and ambition to grow into a senior or managerial marketing position in the near future.


Responsibilities:


🚀 What You’ll Do


1️⃣ Digital & Social Media Marketing

Plan, execute, and optimise campaigns on Meta, TikTok, Google, Shopee, and Lazada.

Manage posting schedules, analytics, and content calendar.

Work with creative and video teams to craft engaging visuals and copy.


2️⃣ Content Creation & Storytelling

Develop brand stories that connect emotionally with audiences.

Support lifestyle photoshoots, product videos, and campaign ideation.

Keep content fresh, trendy, and aligned with YU HOME’s tone.


3️⃣ Event & Retail Marketing

Assist in event promotions, product launches, and exhibition shows.

Coordinate printed collaterals and booth visuals with design partners.


4️⃣ Collaboration & Reporting

Work closely with the sales and CS teams to align marketing support with business goals.

Track campaign performance, analyse insights, and propose improvements.


💡 What We’re Looking For

· Diploma or Degree in Marketing, Communications, or related field.

· 1–3 years of relevant experience in digital marketing, creative content, or brand management (fresh grads with strong portfolios welcome!).

· Proficient in social media tools and marketing platforms.

· Creative thinker with excellent written and visual sense.

· Organised, adaptable, and eager to learn new tools and trends.

· Comfortable working in a fast-moving environment with clear KPIs.

· Bilingual in English and Mandarin is an advantage.


💼 What We Offer

✅ Competitive Salary

✅ 5-Day Work Week (Mon–Fri, 9am–6pm)

✅ Annual Leave, Birthday Leave, Medical Benefits

✅ Friendly, fast-growing work environment with career progression

✅ Opportunities for regional exposure and cross-border projects


💬 Join Our Mission

If you love creativity, smart design, and meaningful marketing — YU HOME is where your career grows alongside innovation.

📧 Apply now with your resume & portfolio:

👉 valgoh@yuhome.com.sg

💻 Learn more: www.yuhome.com.sg


YU HOME – your home, made better.

postedCompany.description: YU HOME (www.yuhome.com.sg) is the fast-growing Singapore brand in the Household Appliances industry. We believe human resources is the main key to success. If you are someone who has a passion for service and is always eager to go, this may just be the perfect role for you! Apply if you think we're a good match and we'll get in touch with you shortly.
postedCompany.name: YU HOME PTE. LTD.
